FsmCommandc
Commanda
Turn on/off disk recycle used by shared pools. Also supports update
recycle space occupancy limit. If recycle space more than
upper-limit, will reclaim space chronologically until lower-limit.
Also supports update recyle file remain days(default 5 days), 
more than 5 days file will be clear by event recycle_check.
Automatically set all the pools on this host without option --name.
-g only apply to set remain days on cluster nodesc
operate)
updatez
operate for disk recycle)
choices
helpz
upper-limitz*recycle space occupancy upper limit(0-100))
type
dest
metavarr
lower-limitz*recycle space occupancy lower limit(0-100)z
remain_daysz$specify file remain days, default(5)z
store_const
TrueF
globalzEExecute command on all nodes in ocfs2 cluster, default on local node.)
action
const
defaultr
--name
	pool_namez	pool-namez8specify a pool by name on this host when setting recycle)
add_argument
int)
self
parser
$./fsm/cmdline/commands/setrecycle.py
add_arguments
Command.add_argumentsc
snd	}
]"}	|	d"
|	d$
Builds the requestr

[0m: Set upper/lower limits or remain days is meaningless when closing the recycle feature, abortZ
